'''Feleema''' was the wife of the surgeon [[Erel Kersos]].

==Biography==
Erel broke the rules of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] marrying an [[List of phrases and slang/Legends|ekster]] (a non-Corellian person). Erel left his home planet for Feleema. Unfortunately, six [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, Feleema died in a [[Hovertrain/Legends|Maglev train]] accident on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1stm}}
